---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Mergen
title: "[feature] "
labels: feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## 👋 Please open a Discussion instead

Feature requests are best handled in
**[GitHub Discussions → Ideas](https://github.com/omertt27/Mergen/discussions/categories/ideas)**
where we can have a proper conversation before any implementation decision is made.

**[→ Open a Discussion](https://github.com/omertt27/Mergen/discussions/new?category=ideas)**

---

If you still want to file this as an issue, answer the following:

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would it work? What would the MCP tool / API / config look like? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you consider? Why is this the right approach? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, links, related issues, or anything else. -->

---

> **Note:** Mergen is public-source, closed-governance. We do not accept
> external pull requests. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
> All feature ideas are reviewed by the core team and the best ones land
> on the [ROADMAP](../../ROADMAP.md).
